basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Library Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Library Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 16 July 2026 on the official website iitjammu.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Jammu Library Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in any discipline along with 55% Marks in Master in Library and Information Science
qualification.details: Bachelor Degree in any discipline along with 55% Marks in Master in Library and Information Science. Master Degree in any discipline (Desirable). 1 year experience (Desirable).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Library Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Library Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Library Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Library Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Library Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Jammu Library Assistant positions is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Library Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Library Assistant position at the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor Degree in any discipline along with a Master's degree in Library and Information Science with at least 55% marks to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, having 1 year of experience in a relevant field is considered desirable for the Library Assistant position at IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Library Assistant post is 33 years. Age relaxation details, if any, will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Library Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Library Assistant role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 29,000 to Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for IIT Jammu Library Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Library Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a Trade Test or Interaction, and finally an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Library Assistant post at IIT Jammu is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
